title: Hensinple Magnetic for Google Pixel 9 Case/Google Pixel 9 Pro Case with Tempered Glass Screen Protector, Fit for MagSafe, 360 Shockproof Anti-yellowing Clear Back Cover, Transparent
features: 【Google Pixel 9/Google Pixel 9 Pro】Only fit Case for Google Pixel 9/Google Pixel 9 Pro. Accurate built-in strong N52 magnets offers a strong attach experience and faster wireless charging. You can charge your Google Pixel 9/Google Pixel 9 Pro Case on Mag-Safe or Qi charger or wireless for incredible convenience without taking off case.

【Non-Yellowing】The Google Pixel 9/Google Pixel 9 Pro case is made of hard PC material with superior scratch-resistance. Meanwhile, it will never get yellowing and always maintains a clear outlook, showing the original beauty of your Google Pixel 9/Google Pixel 9 Pro phone.

【Rugged Military-Grade Protection】Crafted with exclusive 3nd gen X-SHOCK Tech on all 4 corners,embedded with 360° Airbags inside,made with TPU bumper of 4-ply cushioning structure, provides excellent protection to your Google Pixel 9/Google Pixel 9 Pro phone from up to 10 FT drop, exceeding MIL-Grade PROT standard.Besides,the 0.5mm screen bezels and 0.5mm camera lips protect your Google Pixel 9/Google Pixel 9 Pro from dust and scratches.

【Focus on Details】The Google Pixel 9/Google Pixel 9 Pro case is designed with raised lips to add much protection to the screen and camera, and aligned cutouts for full access to the speaker, camera, fingerprint sensor, charging port and so on. Form-fitted cover will not make your phone look bulky, not affecting phone’s folding experience at all.

【Professional Support】Only Compatible for Google Pixel 9/Google Pixel 9 Pro. So please check your phone model before purchasing. lf you encounter any problems such as wrong size case,install or any non-expectations, please contact us through the Amazon Message Center, and you will get support within 12 hrs.
